title: solenotus schelichowii
intro: Solenotus schelichowii, also known as Schelichow's solenotus, is a type of plant that belongs to the genus Solenotus, which is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion. The health benefits of Solenotus schelichowii include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Solenotus schelichowii is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and may also be used in capsule or powder form for its medicinal and health benefits.
